title: doronicum columnae subsp. carpaticum
intro: Doronicum columnae subsp. carpaticum, also known as Carpathian leopard's bane, is a rare plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Carpathian Mountains. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipruritic effects, making it useful in treating various skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Carpathian leopard's bane include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, which can help prevent infections. Traditionally, the plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
